text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇩🇺🇸 Indonesia’s Ministry of Defence has said that no final approval has been given for U.S. military aircraft to access its airspace. A blanket overflight clearance document has not been finalised and has no legal binding power, a ministry spokesman said.…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇩 U.S. Secretary of War Pete Hegseth met with Indonesian Defence Minister Sjafrie Sjamsoeddin at the Pentagon, where the two leaders agreed to elevate the bilateral defence relationship to a Major Defence Cooperation Partnership. The partnership focuses on military modernisation, training and professional military education, and exercises and operational cooperation. The two nations will explore co‑developing asymmetric capabilities in maritime, subsurface and autonomous systems, and will enhance joint special forces training. Indonesia was commended for its role in the Board of Peace and the International Stabilisation Force. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇩🇺🇸 印度尼西亚国防部表示，尚未就美国军用飞机进入其领空给予最终批准。国防部发言人称，一份全面的过境许可文件尚未最终确定，且不具备法律约束力……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇩 美国战争部长皮特·赫格塞斯（Pete Hegseth）在五角大楼会见了印度尼西亚国防部长沙夫里·沙姆苏丁（Sjafrie Sjamsoeddin），两位领导人同意将双边防务关系提升为“主要防务合作伙伴关系”。该伙伴关系侧重于军事现代化、训练与专业军事教育，以及演习和行动合作。两国将探索在海事、水下和自主系统领域共同开发非对称能力，并将加强特种部队联合训练。印度尼西亚在和平委员会和国际稳定部队中的作用受到赞扬。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇨🇳 Chinese Defense Ministry: Chinese ships continue to move in and out of the waters of the Strait of Hormuz. We have trade and energy agreements with Iran, which we will respect and abide by. We expect others not to interfere in our affairs. Iran controls the Strait of Hormuz, and has opened it to us.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇨🇳 中国国防部：中国船只继续在霍尔木兹海峡水域进出。我们与伊朗有贸易和能源协议，我们将尊重并遵守这些协议。我们希望其他方不要干涉我们的事务。伊朗控制着霍尔木兹海峡，并已向我们开放。

text: Trump has deleted the post portraying himself as Jesus Christ. Know why? Because he forgot that the above figures in the sun are demons not angels
text_zh: 特朗普删除了那张将自己描绘成耶稣基督的照片。知道为什么吗？因为他忘了太阳里的那些人物是恶魔，而不是天使。

text: 🇭🇺 🇺🇦 Hungary’s incoming government says it won’t oppose an EU €90bn loan to Ukraine, but also won’t take part in the scheme, Magyar said. He added the issue can be discussed with future EU counterparts. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇭🇺 🇺🇦 马扎尔（Magyar）表示，匈牙利新政府称不会反对欧盟向乌克兰提供900亿欧元的贷款，但也不会参与该计划。他补充说，这个问题可以与未来的欧盟同行讨论。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇭🇺 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu expresses appreciation to Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orbán, calling him a “true friend of Israel” who supported the country during its war. He congratulates Peter Magyar on his election victory, wishing him success in leading Hungary while strengthening ties between the two nations. He says he looks forward to continued cooperation for the benefit of both peoples. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇭🇺 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡向匈牙利总理维克托·欧尔班表示感谢，称他是“以色列的真正朋友”，在战争期间支持该国。他祝贺彼得·马扎尔（Peter Magyar）赢得选举，祝愿他在领导匈牙利的同时加强两国关系取得成功。他说，他期待继续合作，造福两国人民。 @wfwitness

text: Netanyahu: I want to express my deep appreciation to my dear friend Viktor Orbán, a true friend of Israel, who stood firmly by Israel's side in the face of unjust international vilification. I congratulate Peter Magyar on his election victory. I wish him success in leading Hungary forward, while strengthening the strong ties between our nations. I look forward to continuing our cooperation for the benefit of both our peoples.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡：我要向我亲爱的朋友维克托·欧尔班表达我深深的谢意，他是以色列真正的朋友，在面对不公正的国际诋毁时坚定地站在以色列一边。我祝贺彼得·马扎尔赢得选举。我祝愿他在带领匈牙利前进的同时，加强我们两国之间的牢固关系。我期待继续我们的合作，造福我们两国人民。

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @azov_media : For the first time, the First Corps Azov of the National Guard of Ukraine and the 7th Rapid Response Corps of the Air Assault Forces of the Armed Forces of Ukraine conducted joint command post exercises with the support of the Security Assistance Group–Ukraine (SAG-U). The importance of these exercises is driven by the adjacency of the corps’ areas of responsibility on the front line. Accordingly, staff officers focused on synchronizing joint efforts and refining joint planning. "Your task is to make military decisions quickly and effectively," Brigadier General Yevhen Lasiychuk, commander of the 7th Corps of the Air Assault Forces, told officers during the training. In turn, the commander of the First Corps Azov of the National Guard of Ukraine, Brigadier General Denys Prokopenko, emphasized that the purpose of the exercises was to ensure coordination at the junction of the corps, building an integrated system of reconnaissance, fire engagement, and mining to prevent the enemy from breaking through the defensive line. The Commander of the Air Assault Forces, Major General Oleh Apostol, also addressed the officers: "Officers must be able to thoroughly analyze the situation and provide the commander with objective operational information. This enables sound decision-making on the battlefield." "Every three months, it is a different war. You must learn quickly, adapt, and remain flexible," said Major General Oleksandr Pivnenko, Commander of the National Guard of Ukraine, addressing the participants. tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @azov_media ：乌克兰国民警卫队亚速第一军团与乌克兰武装部队空中突击部队第7快速反应军团首次在“乌克兰安全援助小组”（SAG-U）的支持下进行了联合指挥所演习。这些演习的重要性源于各军团在前方责任区的邻接性。因此，参谋人员专注于同步联合行动并完善联合规划。“你们的任务是快速有效地做出军事决策，”空中突击部队第7军团指挥官叶夫根·拉西丘克（Yevhen Lasiychuk）准将在训练期间对军官们说。反过来，乌克兰国民警卫队亚速第一军团指挥官丹尼斯·普罗科彭科（Denys Prokopenko）准将强调，演习的目的是确保军团结合部的协调，建立一个综合的侦察、火力打击和布雷系统，以防止敌人突破防线。空中突击部队指挥官奥列格·阿波斯托尔（Oleh Apostol）少将也向军官们发表了讲话：“军官必须能够彻底分析局势，并向指挥官提供客观的作战信息。这有助于在战场上做出正确的决策。” “每三个月就是一场不同的战争。你们必须快速学习、适应并保持灵活性，”乌克兰国民警卫队指挥官亚历山大·皮夫年科（Oleksandr Pivnenko）少将对参与者说。推文

Iran controls the Strait of Hormuz and it is open for us.” - Open Source Intel tweet

text: U.S. Central Command USS Tripoli (LHA 7) conducts night flight operations while sailing in the Arabian Sea. Tripoli is designed without a traditional well deck, which allows for more F-35B Lightning II stealth fighters, MV-22 Ospreys, helicopters, and extra maintenance space. During peak operations, the ship can surge to support up to 20+ F-35Bs. tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部 “的黎波里”号（USS Tripoli, LHA 7）在阿拉伯海航行时进行夜间飞行作业。的黎波里号的设计没有传统的坞舱，这使得它能够容纳更多的F-35B“闪电II”隐身战斗机、MV-22“鱼鹰”、直升机和额外的维护空间。在高峰作业期间，该舰可支持多达20多架F-35B。推文

No decision on military action…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Israeli Channel 14: Israel is making preparations for an immediate renewal of the war with Iran. @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 Semi-official Tasnim News Agency has published a detailed analysis of the failed Islamabad talks, describing the U.S. delegation as “surrounded by unauthorised brokers” and lacking decision‑making authority. The Iranian team, led by parliament speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, consisted of 71 carefully selected experts and was described as “cohesive, powerful and logical”. Talks lasted approximately 24 hours, moving into technical areas. The US delegation, by contrast, was reportedly chaotic, with 300 members and no internal coherence. Iranian negotiators said the U.S. approach resembled “real estate haggling” rather than principled diplomacy. Tehran concluded that Washington is in a deadlock on the battlefield and needs negotiations more than Iran does, and that the announced naval blockade is primarily psychological pressure. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 半官方的塔斯尼姆通讯社发表了一份关于伊斯兰堡谈判失败的详细分析，称美国代表团“被未经授权的中间人包围”，缺乏决策权。由议长穆罕默德·巴盖尔·卡利巴夫（Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf）领导的伊朗团队由71名精心挑选的专家组成，被描述为“团结、强大且合乎逻辑”。谈判持续了大约24小时，进入了技术领域。相比之下，据报道美国代表团一片混乱，有300名成员，内部缺乏凝聚力。伊朗谈判代表表示，美国的方法更像是“房地产讨价还价”，而不是有原则的外交。德黑兰得出的结论是，华盛顿在战场上陷入僵局，比伊朗更需要谈判，而宣布的海上封锁主要是心理压力。 @wfwitness

text: Netanyahu acknowledges that Trump administration reports to him 📰 Netanyahu at a cabinet meeting: "I spoke yesterday with Vice President J.D. Vance. He called me from his plane on his way back from Islamabad. He reported to me in detail, as this administration does every day."
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡承认特朗普政府向他汇报 📰 内塔尼亚胡在内阁会议上：“我昨天与副总统J.D.万斯通了话。他在从伊斯兰堡回来的飞机上给我打了电话。他向我详细汇报了情况，正如这届政府每天所做的那样。”

text: 🎥 ON TODAY'S SHOW! Pepe Escobar: The ‘Second Coming’ at Hormuz — Trump Blocks the Blockade We welcome back the rockstar of geopolitics, Pepe Escobar, to break down what’s happening around Trump’s blockade of the Strait of Hormuz—who really holds the cards, Trump’s “Second Coming” energy, and an economy under serious strain. Tune in! ➡️ 7PM CET - 8PM MSK - 1PM ET - 10AM PT ➡️ Watch on: YouTube - X - Rumble - Twitch - Kick 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🎥 今日节目！佩佩·埃斯科巴（Pepe Escobar）：霍尔木兹海峡的“第二次降临”——特朗普阻止了封锁。我们欢迎地缘政治摇滚明星佩佩·埃斯科巴回归，剖析特朗普封锁霍尔木兹海峡周围发生的事情——谁真正掌握着主动权，特朗普的“第二次降临”能量，以及处于严重压力下的经济。敬请收看！ ➡️ 欧洲中部时间晚上7点 - 莫斯科时间晚上8点 - 美国东部时间下午1点 - 太平洋时间上午10点 ➡️ 观看平台：YouTube - X - Rumble - Twitch - Kick 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 The US naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz is now officially underway. 🔸 15+ US warships in position 🔸 UK Maritime Trade Operations confirming restrictions on Iranian ports across the Persian Gulf, Gulf of Oman and parts of the Arabian Sea 🔸 Trump threatening to destroy any Iranian fast-attack boats that approach: "using the same system of kill that we use against the drug dealers on boats at Sea" Iran's response: no port in the Persian Gulf or Sea of Oman will be safe if Iranian ports are threatened. The IRGC Navy says any military vessel approaching the Strait of Hormuz is a ceasefire violation. The ceasefire and the blockade are now running simultaneously. One of them will break first. WSJ. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国对霍尔木兹海峡的海上封锁现已正式开始。 🔸 15艘以上美国军舰就位 🔸 英国海上贸易行动证实对波斯湾、阿曼湾和阿拉伯海部分地区的伊朗港口实施限制 🔸 特朗普威胁要摧毁任何接近的伊朗快速攻击艇：“使用我们打击海上毒贩的同一套杀戮系统” 伊朗的回应：如果伊朗港口受到威胁，波斯湾或阿曼湾的任何港口都不会安全。伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军表示，任何接近霍尔木兹海峡的军舰都是违反停火协议的行为。停火和封锁现在同时进行。其中一个会先崩溃。华尔街日报。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to Lebanese News and Updates: "The presidency issued the below:"
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Lebanese News and Updates：“总统府发布了以下内容：”

text: Keir Starmer: Impact of Iran’s behaviour in the Strait is causing untold economic damage.
text_zh: 基尔·斯塔默：伊朗在海峡的行为造成了无法估量的经济损失。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷WSJ: More than 15 US warships are deployed to support the blockade of Iran, according to US officials. The vessels include an aircraft carrier, destroyers, and support ships involved in maritime operations targeting Iranian shipping. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ : U.S. President Trump’s naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, set to begin Monday at 10am ET, opens a risky new phase in the six‑week conflict. While the U.S. has the resources to enforce the blockade, sustaining control will be difficult. The IRGC still retains over 60% of its fast‑attack boats, and Iran could strike Saudi and UAE bypass pipelines or close the Bab al‑Mandeb strait via proxies. Global economic pain is mounting: Asian factories are curbing production, airports are running out of jet fuel, and Gulf economies are forecast to shrink sharply – Qatar’s GDP by 13%, the UAE’s by 8%, and Saudi Arabia’s by 6.6%. The blockade could strip an additional 2 million barrels per day from global markets. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷华尔街日报：据美国官员称，超过15艘美国军舰被部署以支持对伊朗的封锁。这些船只包括一艘航空母舰、驱逐舰和参与针对伊朗航运的海上行动的支援舰。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 华尔街日报：美国总统特朗普对霍尔木兹海峡的海上封锁定于美国东部时间周一上午10点开始，开启了六周冲突中危险的新阶段。虽然美国有资源执行封锁，但维持控制将很困难。伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队仍保留了60%以上的快速攻击艇，伊朗可能会打击沙特和阿联酋的绕行管道，或通过代理人关闭曼德海峡。全球经济痛苦正在加剧：亚洲工厂正在削减产量，机场的航空燃油即将耗尽，海湾经济体预计将大幅萎缩——卡塔尔GDP萎缩13%，阿联酋萎缩8%，沙特萎缩6.6%。封锁可能使全球市场每天额外减少200万桶石油供应。 @wfwitness

text: Keir Starmer: We call for Lebanon to be included urgently in the ceasefire. Hezbollah must disarm. But I'm equally clear: Israel's strikes are wrong. The bombing should stop now.
text_zh: 基尔·斯塔默：我们呼吁黎巴嫩紧急加入停火协议。真主党必须解除武装。但我同样明确：以色列的袭击是错误的。轰炸现在应该停止。

text: The presidency issued the below: President Joseph Aoun, accompanied by the First Lady, receives a delegation from the families of the martyrs of the Ain Saadeh strike: The relevant security and judicial authorities are continuing their investigations to clarify the circumstances of this attack and take appropriate measures, and the state is exerting all efforts to stop the war and put an end to bloodshed.
text_zh: 总统府发布了以下内容：约瑟夫·奥恩（Joseph Aoun）总统在第一夫人的陪同下，接见了艾因萨德（Ain Saadeh）袭击事件烈士家属代表团：相关安全和司法部门正在继续调查，以澄清这次袭击的情况并采取适当措施，国家正在尽一切努力停止战争并结束流血事件。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷The blockade of the Strait of Hormuz is now in effect after U.S. President Trump’s 10am deadline has passed. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ: More than 15 US warships are deployed to support the blockade of Iran, according to US officials. The vessels include an aircraft carrier, destroyers, and support ships involved in maritime operations targeting Iranian shipping. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷在特朗普总统上午10点的最后期限过后，对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁现已生效。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 华尔街日报：据美国官员称，超过15艘美国军舰被部署以支持对伊朗的封锁。这些船只包括一艘航空母舰、驱逐舰和参与针对伊朗航运的海上行动的支援舰。 @wfwitness

text: Aoun is not the president of Lebanon. He is the president of Lebanese Christians only. He is the president of Eastern Beirut, Keserwan, and only other Christian areas. As simple as that The cunt son of a whore, when 2,000+ Lebanese were killed from Beirut and south Lebanon thought it is a priority to host the family of the Christian Lebanese Forces Party who was killed in a wrong Israeli airstrike in Ain Saadeh Everyone else doesn't matter. The Lebanese Army commander goes to the border to give condolences to the father of the church there killed by Israel. On the other hand not a single official comes when Israel killed 13 Shia members of the Lebanese State security personnel. Damn you and damn your Lebanon
text_zh: 奥恩不是黎巴嫩总统。他只是黎巴嫩基督徒的总统。他是贝鲁特东部、凯塞鲁万（Keserwan）和其他基督教地区的总统。就这么简单。那个婊子养的混蛋，当2000多名黎巴嫩人在贝鲁特和黎巴嫩南部被杀时，他认为优先事项是接待在艾因萨德一次错误的以色列空袭中丧生的基督教黎巴嫩力量党成员的家属。其他人都不重要。黎巴嫩军队指挥官前往边境向在那里被以色列杀害的教堂神父的父亲表示哀悼。另一方面，当以色列杀害了13名黎巴嫩国家安全部队的什叶派成员时，没有一个官员出现。去你的，去你的黎巴嫩

text: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ Belarus-Born Roman Goffman Approved as New Mossad Chief The occupation regime has appointed Roman Goffman as the new head of Mossad. Chosen by War Criminal Netanyahu, the move faces backlash as Goffman reportedly lacks intelligence credentials and is seen as another loyalist pick over competence. Even Zionist media resurfaced footage from October 7 showing him retreating under fire near Sderot before being wounded. From battlefield failure to spy chief, only in the Zionist regime.
text_zh: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 白俄罗斯出生的罗曼·戈夫曼（Roman Goffman）被批准为新任摩萨德局长。占领政权任命罗曼·戈夫曼为摩萨德新负责人。此举由战争罪犯内塔尼亚胡选定，但遭到强烈反对，据报道戈夫曼缺乏情报资历，被视为又一个忠诚派而非能力派的选择。甚至犹太复国主义媒体也重新发布了10月7日的录像，显示他在斯德洛特（Sderot）附近在炮火下撤退，随后受伤。从战场失败到间谍头目，只发生在犹太复国主义政权。
